emails.subject: RE: SCE Stip and Enron's Receivable
emails.body: RE: SCE Stip and Enron's Receivable We have not made public the SCE amount (as far as I'm aware). We need to make sure that IR is in the loop I think that Mark Koenig is following this issue. Jim

emails.subject: RE: SCE Stip and Enron's Receivable
emails.body: I propose that we agree on a number in a confidential side letter with SCE and not include it in the publicly-available stip.

emails.subject: RE: SCE Stip and Enron's Receivable
